mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders( user_id, store_id, payment_method, total_price, requests, created_data ) VALUES( #{userId}, #{storeId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{totalPrice}, #{requests}, NOW() )
INSERT INTO order_menu( order_id, menu_id, option_id, option_name, option_price, price ) VALUES( #{orderId}, #{menuId}, #{optionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{optionName}, #{optionPrice}, #{price} )
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, o.store_id AS storeId, s.name AS storeName, o.payment_method AS paymentMethod, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.requests AS requests, o.created_data AS createdAt, m.name AS firstMenuName, (SELECT COUNT(*) - 1 FROM order_menu WHERE order_id = o.order_id) AS extraCount FROM orders o JOIN store s ON o.store_id = s.store_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_id, MIN(order_menu_id) as min_id FROM order_menu GROUP BY order_id ) first_item ON o.order_id = first_item.order_id LEFT JOIN order_menu om ON first_item.min_id = om.order_menu_id LEFT JOIN menu m ON om.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.order_id DESC

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.user_id AS userId, o.store_id AS storeId, s.name AS storeName, o.payment_method AS paymentMethod, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.requests AS requests, o.created_data AS createdAt FROM orders o JOIN store s ON o.store_id = s.store_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT om.order_menu_id AS orderMenuId, om.order_id AS orderId, om.menu_id AS menuId, m.name AS menuName, m.image AS menuimage, om.option_id AS optionId, om.option_name AS optionName, om.option_price AS optionPrice, om.price AS price FROM order_menu om JOIN menu m ON om.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE om.order_id = #{orderId}
